sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_capacity (id UInt32, capacity UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, formatReadableSize(capacity) AS readable_capacity FROM test_capacity;
UPDATE test_capacity SET capacity = filesystemCapacity() WHERE id = 1;
SELECT formatReadableSize(filesystemCapacity()) AS current_capacity, id FROM test_capacity WHERE id = 1;
